title: centaurea × milliati
intro: Centaurea × milliati, a hybrid of the Centaurea plant species, is a flowering plant known for its vibrant purple flowers and versatility in herbal medicine. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × milliati include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
